content:
Advice: Read the game mechanic in the light bulb icon on the left of your lobby screen first.

Hope this thread can help you navigate Morimens’ gameplay elements better.

Realm mechanics:
- Chaos: increase Posse limit by 1000 => Allows to use Posse twice a turn. Gains 250 S-energy at the end of the turn. Gains 5 aliemus for all awakers when use Posse. Lv 45 Account bonus: choose 1 of 3 silver relics (random) at the start of exploration. Chaos awaker also provides 100% Death Res just for having them in the team (100% is max, so 1 or 2 Chaos in Caro team will only provide 100%).

In Aequor: Increases tentacle base damage by 1% of max hp for every Chaos in team. Chaos exalt also increases tentacle assembly by 1 and charges 10 aliemus for all Aequor teammates.

In Caro: Chaos exalt increases Embryo Fusion by 25%. Increases Scarlet Furnace value by an extra 2% max hp for every Chaos in team.

In Ultra: Permanently reduce all enemies attack by 0,5% max hp, increase all alies power by 1% max hp, increase all Ultra’s crit and critdmg by 10% for every Chaos in team.

- Aequor: Tentacle will attack the frontmost enemy at the end of the turn. Each Exalt (Ultimate) increases tentacle assembly (how many times tentacle will attack) by 1.

- Caro: Embryo Fusion + 20% at the start of the turn. Scarlet Furnace (red icon, use for healing) increases by 5% max hp after the battle. First Devour (eats an embryo) will gain shield and temporary power (1 turn attack buff). Increases Embryo Fusion and First Devoured efficiancy by 1% for every 1% hp lost.

- Ultra: First card plays each turn trigger Warp effect and enter Ultra Space. After 5 turns enter Ultra Space, place all cards in the Ultra Space in hand. All Ultra Awakers’ Warp effects trigger in Ultra Space. 
Annihilation: Tap the purple vortex at the left of Ultra Space bar to activate. Remove the leftmost card in Ultra Space and add 1 Inspiration (0 athri card that gives 1 athri and draw 1 card) to your hand. Usable once per turn.
thread_title: Stats and realm mechanics (and some tips)
